headline: Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO): Best Quality Growth Stocks to Buy
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc. (NASDAQ:TTWO) is one of the best quality growth stocks to buy. On May 21, Take-Two Interactive Software reported a strong finish to FY26, with total net bookings reaching $6.72 billion, an increase of 19% over the previous year. Q4 generated $1.58 billion in net bookings, driven largely by recurrent consumer spending, […]
